verses.text: Isaac teekin a mitte maangin khua a muh theih nawnloh ciangin a ta upa zaw Esau samin ama kiangah, “Ka tapa aw,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi
Amah in, “En in, kei ka teek hi. Ka sih ding hun ka thei kei hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, na hiamte ahi na thallawng leh na thal la in la, gamlakah pai-in kei-a' dingin sa va beng in
Ka sih ma-in nang thupha kong piak theihna dingin kei' duh bangin an lim hong bawl in la, ka nek dingin hong paipih in,” a ci hi
Isaac in a tapa Esau a hopih laitakin Rebekah in na ngaisim hi. Sa bengin a ciahpih dingin Esau gamlakah a kuan ciangin
Rebekah in a tapa Jakob kiangah, “Na sanggampa Esau' tungah na pa' thugen ka za a
‘Ka sih ma-in Topa' mai-ah nang thupha kong piak theihna dingin ka nek dingin na sa matsa hong paipih in la, kei-a' dingin an lim hong bawl in,’ ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka ta aw, kong thupiak bangin gamta in
Ama duh bangin na pa-a' dingin an lim ka bawl theihna dingin keelhon lakah va pai in la keelno a hoih nih hong paipih in
Na pa in a sih ma-in nang thupha hong piak theihna dingin a nek dingin na pa kiangah na va paipih ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Jakob in a nu Rebekah kiangah, “En in, ka sanggampa Esau pen mulnei mi hi a, kei pen cineel mi ka hi hi
Ka pa in kei hong lawngkha leh, amah in ka khemna hong thei ding a, kei' tungah thupha hiloin samsiatna hong tung zawsop ding hi,” a ci hi
A nu in ama kiangah, “Nangma thuak ding samsiatna kei tungah hong tung ta hen, ka ta aw; ka thu hong mangpeuh inla, pai-in keelnote kei' kiangah hong puak in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in keelnote va la-in a nu kiangah paipih a, a pa' duh bangin a nu in an lim a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Rebekah in inn-a a kep, ama ta upa zaw Esau' puan hoihpente la-in a ta nauzaw Jakob a silhsak hi
Amah in keelnote' vun ama khut tung leh a neelna mun a ngawng sanah silhsak a
a bawlsa meh lim leh an a tapa Jakob a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin a pa' kiangah amah pai a, “Ka pa aw,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing, ka ta aw; kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Jakob in a pa kiangah, “Na ta upa zaw Esau ka hi hi. Nong gen bangin ka hih khin hi. Kei thupha nong piak theihna dingin tu-in tuto in la ka sa matsa ne in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Isaac in a tapa' kiangah, “Ka ta aw, bangcia hong hici manlan' pak na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “ Topa nangma Pasian in kei hong tuahpha sak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Isaac in Jakob kiangah
“Ka ta aw, ka ta Esau taktak na hi hiam, na hi kei hiam kong lawn' theihna dingin ka nai-ah hong pai in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a pa Isaac' kiangah Jakob pai a, amah lawngin, “A aw, Jakob' aw hi, ahih hangin a khutte, Esau' khut hi,” a ci hi
A khutte in a sanggampa Esau' khut bangin mul nei ahih manin amah in theilo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in thupha pia dingin kithawi a
“Ka ta Esau taktak na hi hiam?” ci-in dongkik hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka tapa nangma sa matsa ne-in thupha kong piak theihna dingin ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a kiangah paipih a, amah in a ne hi. Amah in leenggahzu paipihin, amah in a dawn hi
Tua ciangin a pa Isaac in ama kiangah, “Ka kiangah hong pai in la hong nam in, ka ta aw,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah a nai-ah hong pai-in a pa a nam hi. Amah in a puan gimnamte nam a, amah thupha pia-in, “En in, ka tapa' gimnam pen Topa in thupha a piak gamlak gimnam tawh kibang
Pasian in na tungah vantung daitui hong pia hen la, na lote hoihsak ta hen. An leh leenggahzu tampi hong pia ta hen

Mite in nangma na hong sem hen la, minamte na mai-ah hong kun ta uh hen. Na sanggamte' tungah topa hi in la, na sanggamte' suanlekhakte, na mai-ah hong kun uh hen. Nang hong samsia peuhmah in samsiatna ngah hen la, thupha hong pia peuhmah in thupha ngah ta hen,” a ci hi. *
Isaac in Jakob thupha a piak a man khit, a pa Isaac' omna panin Jakob a paikhiat khit phetin, a sa betna panin a sanggampa Esau hong tung hi
Amah in zong an lim bawlin a pa' kiangah hong paipih hi. Amah in a pa' kiangah, “Thupha nong piak theihna dingin na tapa' sa matsa a ne dingin ka pa hong tho in,” a ci hi
A pa Isaac in ama kiangah, “Kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen na tapa, a suak masa Esau ka hi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Isaac nakpi takin lingin, “Tua ahih leh, nang' hong pai ma-in sa matsa hong paipihin, a vekin ka nek khit, amah thupha ka piakpa kua ahi hiam? Thupha pia khin ka hih manin amah in thupha ngah ding hi” a ci hi
Esau in a pa' kammalte a zak ciangin nakpi tak leh nasia takin kikokhia-in a pa' kiangah, “Kei thupha hong pia in, kei zong, aw ka pa!” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “Khemna tawh na sanggampa hong pai-in amah in na thupha lakhia khinta hi,” a ci hi

Esau in, “Amah Jakob kici mah hilo ahi hiam? Amah in kei nihvei hong suankhia khin hi. Amah in ka innluahza hong sut hi. En in, tu-in amah in ka thupha hong sut leuleu hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei-a' dingin thupha sitlo na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Isaac in Esau dawngin, “En in, amah nangma' topa-in ka bawl khin a, a sanggamte khempeuh ama tungah nasemin ka pia khin a, an leh leenggahzu tawh amah ka hingsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka ta aw, nang-a' dingin bang hih thei nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Esau in a pa' kiangah, “Pa aw, thupha khat beek nei nawnlo na hi hiam? Kei thupha hong pia in, kei zong, ka pa aw,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Esau a kap hi
Tua ciangin a pa Isaac in, “En in, leitung pana piang an leh leenggahzu na nei kei ding a, na lo-a' dingin vantung daituite na ngah kei ding hi
Na namsau tawh na nungta ding a, na sanggampa' na na sem ding hi. Ahih hangin amah na langpan' ciangin ama khutnuai panin na lengkhia ding hi,” a ci hi. *

A pa in amah thupha pia khin ahih manin tua thupha hangin tu-in Esau in Jakob mudah a, Esau in, “Ka pa' sihna hangin dahna ding hun hong nai ta hi. Tua khit ciangin ka sanggampa Jakob ka that ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi

Ahih hangin a tapa upa zaw Esau' ngimna, Rebekah' tungah kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a ta nauzaw Jakob samin ama kiangah, “En in, na sanggampa Esau in nangmah thah ding vaihawmna tawh amah kihehnem hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka ta aw, ka thu hong mang in. Haran-a ka sanggampa Laban' kiangah va tai in la
na sanggampa' hehna a dam mateng tua lai ama kiangah tawlkhat sung va om in

Na sanggampa' sinsona a daih mateng, ama tunga na gamtatna a mangngilh mateng va om in. Tua ciangin mi hong sawlin hih lai munah nang kong lasak ding hi. Bang hangin note gel tawh nikhat thu-in kei kikhen ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Rebekah in Isaac kiangah, “Esau' zi Hit numeite' hangin ka lung gimin ka cimtak hi. Jakob in hih gam numeite khat ahi Hit numeite khat ten'pih leh kei-a' dingin bang nuntak tham nawn ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
